autoPayCosts.hint: If enabled, HP, MP, and GP costs of abilities will default to being automatically paid upon use.
autoPayCosts.name: Automatically Pay Costs

consumeAmmunition.hint: If enabled, ammunition consumption will be on by default.
consumeAmmunition.name: Consume Ammunition

consumeEquipment.hint: If enabled, equipment consumption will be on by default.
consumeEquipment.name: Consume Equipment

autoColoration.hint: Automatically change a token's tint color when its actor is wounded.
autoColoration.name: Automatic Coloration

autoDetectionModes.hint: Automatically change a token's detection modes based on its actor's senses.
autoDetectionModes.name: Automatic Detection Modes

autoLighting.hint: Automatically configure light emitted from a token.
autoLighting.name: Automatic Lighting

autoMagic.hint: Automatically add visual effects to tokens based on their current conditions. Requires the Token Magic FX module.
autoMagic.name: Automatic Token Magic Condition Effects

autoScale.hint: Automatically scale a token to match its actor's size.
autoScale.name: Automatic Scale

autoTransformation.hint: Automatically change a token when its actor is transformed.
autoTransformation.name: Automatic Transformation

autoVisionAngle.hint: Automatically change a token's vision angle based on its actor's senses.
autoVisionAngle.name: Automatic Vision Angle

autoVisionModes.hint: If enabled, vision modes will automatically be changed based on abilities and down state.
autoVisionModes.name: Automatically Change Vision Modes

autoVisionRange.hint: Automatically change a token's vision range based on its actor's senses.
autoVisionRange.name: Automatic Vision Range

autoWound.hint: Automatically apply down, critically wounded, and dead statuses.
autoWound.name: Automatic Wound Statuses

actor.hint: Default token synchronization behavior for actors.
actor.name: Actor Settings

rollAttackOnUse.hint: If enabled, using armaments will automatically roll Basic Attack.
rollAttackOnUse.name: Roll Attack on Use

rollSecretly.hint: If enabled, armaments will be used secretly by default.
rollSecretly.name: Roll Secretly

rollTwoHanded.hint: If enabled, armaments will be two-handed when used by default.
rollTwoHanded.name: Roll Two-Handed

armorSuppressesRanks.hint: Alternate rule. If enabled, wearing AV above a rank's maximum suppresses it.
armorSuppressesRanks.name: Armor Suppresses Ranks

armorWeakensRanks.hint: Alternate rule. If enabled, wearing AV above a rank's maximum removes proficiency.
armorWeakensRanks.name: Armor Weakens Ranks

autoPanelCollapseTime.hint: Automatically collapse chat message panels older than this many minutes.
autoPanelCollapseTime.name: Automatic Panel Collapse Time

compendiumTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for compendium entries.
compendiumTooltips.name: Compendium Tooltips

confirmStatDiceRerolls.hint: If enabled, spent stat dice will require confirmation before rerolling.
confirmStatDiceRerolls.name: Confirm Stat Dice Rerolls

consumeOnUse.hint: If enabled, consumable documents have their uses consumed when used by default.
consumeOnUse.name: Consume on Use

contentLinkTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for content links.
contentLinkTooltips.name: Content Link Tooltips

deathBagMessageMode.hint: The default message mode for pulls from the death bag.
deathBagMessageMode.name: Death Bag Message Mode

deathBagStoneColors.hint: Which stone colors are available in the death bag. Only enabled colors are shown when pulling.
deathBagStoneColors.name: Death Bag Stone Colors

defaultConeAngle.hint: The default angle in degrees for cones.
defaultConeAngle.name: Default Cone Angle

defaultDragonBreathAngle.hint: The default angle in degrees for dragon breaths.
defaultDragonBreathAngle.name: Default Dragon Breath Angle

defaultPanelCollapseState.hint: Default state for chat message panels.
defaultPanelCollapseState.name: Default Panel Collapse State

developerMode.hint: Check this if you are a developer of the Teriock system and need additional features. Do not check this otherwise. It is likely to break your game. Even module developers shouldn't check this.
developerMode.name: Developer Mode

documentTooltips.hint: The types of documents that tooltips are displayed for.
documentTooltips.name: Document Tooltips

consumeAmmunition.hint: If enabled, ammunition consumption will be on by default.
consumeAmmunition.name: Consume Ammunition

errorMessages.hint: Error messages to show on document sheets and tooltips.
errorMessages.name: Error Messages

floatingActorTabs.hint: Whether tabs on actor sheets hover outside the window frame.
floatingActorTabs.name: Floating Actor Tabs

highlightModifiedValues.hint: Whether values that differ from their source values are highlighted on sheets.
highlightModifiedValues.name: Highlight Modified Values

identifierSourcePriority.hint: Priority given to different compendiums in resolving clashes while determining the canonical document for a given identifier. The compendiums at the top of this list are given preference over lower ones.
identifierSourcePriority.name: Identifier Source Priority

maximizeApplicationsOnDragEnter.hint: Whether minimized windows should be maximized when while dragging documents into them.
maximizeApplicationsOnDragEnter.name: Maximize Windows on Drag

minimizeApplicationsOnDragStart.hint: Whether windows should be minimized while dragging documents from them. Only certain windows such as sheets will be minimized. This does not affect compendium collections or other document directories.
minimizeApplicationsOnDragStart.name: Minimize Windows on Drag

nonHierarchicalChanges.hint: If enabled, effects can apply changes to other items or effects that they are not descended from. For actors with lots of items and effects, this can cause performance issues. Disable to improve performance.
nonHierarchicalChanges.name: Non-Hierarchical Changes

openChatDocuments.hint: If enabled, players can open documents that have been shared in chat even without ownership.
openChatDocuments.name: Open Chat Documents

openChatImages.hint: If enabled, players can open the images of panels in chat.
openChatImages.name: Open Chat Images

openConditionsAsJournalEntryPages.hint: If enabled, conditions will open as journal entry pages instead of their own sheets.
openConditionsAsJournalEntryPages.name: Open Conditions as Journals

openPanelContextMenuEntry.hint: If enabled, an option to open documents as a panel will be displayed in context menus.
openPanelContextMenuEntry.name: Open Panel Context Menu Entry

playerMacrosFolderName.hint: Name of the folder for macros players create with hotbar drops.
playerMacrosFolderName.name: Player Macros Folder Name

secretAttributes.hint: Feats using these attributes will be automatically set to have blind GM rolls.
secretAttributes.name: Secret Attributes

secretDocuments.hint: Executions using these documents will be automatically set to have blind GM rolls.
secretDocuments.name: Secret Documents

secretTradecrafts.hint: Executions using these tradecrafts will be automatically set to have blind GM rolls.
secretTradecrafts.name: Secret Tradecrafts

selectAddedDocuments.hint: If enabled, buttons that can add either primary or secondary documents show a dialog to select between them, with the alt key setting the default choice. If disabled, alt-clicking adds the secondary documents directly.
selectAddedDocuments.name: Select Added Documents

showErrorTipsOnSheets.hint: If enabled, document sheets show configured error tips.
showErrorTipsOnSheets.name: Show Error Tips on Sheets

showErrorTipsOnTooltips.hint: If enabled, document tooltips show configured error tips.
showErrorTipsOnTooltips.name: Show Error Tips on Tooltips

showRollDialogs.hint: If enabled, a dialog will be shown before making most rolls.
showRollDialogs.name: Show Roll Dialogs

showSuppressionTipsOnSheets.hint: If enabled, document sheets explain why suppressed documents are inactive.
showSuppressionTipsOnSheets.name: Show Suppression Tips on Sheets

showSuppressionTipsOnTooltips.hint: If enabled, document tooltips explain why suppressed documents are inactive.
showSuppressionTipsOnTooltips.name: Show Suppression Tips on Tooltips

sidebarTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for sidebar entries.
sidebarTooltips.name: Sidebar Tooltips

sortNewPlayerMacros.hint: New player macros will be created in folders corresponding to the individual players.
sortNewPlayerMacros.name: Sort New Player Macros

styleDice.hint: Style dice based on damage type, drain type, etc. Requires Dice So Nice! module.
styleDice.name: Style Dice

suppressionMessageTypes.hint: Document types that can display suppression messages.
suppressionMessageTypes.name: Suppression Message Types

suppressionMessages.hint: Suppression messages to show for configured document types.
suppressionMessages.name: Suppression Messages

trackSustainedConsequences.hint: If enabled, sustained consequences will be tracked and turned inactive or deleted based on the ability sustaining them.
trackSustainedConsequences.name: Track sustained consequences.
